landing.title: Track every application without losing the next move
landing.subtitle: JobTracker keeps your pipeline, follow-ups, and outcomes in one focused workspace.
landing.pipelineText: See applications by status instead of hunting through notes.
landing.historyText: Keep changes and progress attached to each application.
landing.focusText: Spot stale applications and decide the next action faster.

auth.signInSubtitle: Track your applications in one place
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.mustAgree: You must agree to the privacy policy
auth.registrationFailed: Registration failed. Email may be taken.
auth.validationFailed: Check the fields and try again
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
auth.serverUnavailable: Server is not responding. Check the connection or try again shortly.
auth.serverWarmingUp: Server is starting. This can take a few seconds.
auth.serverUnavailableShort: Server is not responding. Try again shortly.

dashboard.title: JobTracker
dashboard.firstActionSubtitle: Company and position are enough. Add notes only if they help.
dashboard.noApplications: No applications yet — add one above
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Add the first application above. After that you can update status, review history, and track stalled applications.

onboarding.saveText: Enter the company and role you applied to.
onboarding.moveText: Track applied, interview, offer, and rejection states.
onboarding.reviewText: Use the activity history to see what changed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataText: We only collect your email that you provide during registration.
privacy.accessText: The developer (database owner) technically has access to the list of email addresses. This is necessary for server administration and access recovery upon request.
privacy.confidentialityText: Your email will not be transferred to third parties, will not be sold to advertisers, and will not be used for marketing purposes.
privacy.deletionText: You can delete your account by sending a request to the administrator's email.
privacy.contactNote: You can send an account deletion request, ask questions, or report a problem to this address.
privacy.acceptConfirm: By using the service, you confirm that you have read and agree to these terms.
